titleStmt.title: SII 28.276: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 276. (A.R. No. 430 of 1913.) ĀṞAGAḶŪR, ATTUR TALUK, SALEM DISTRICT.

summary.p: Kāmēśvara temple, central shrine, on the north base of the maṇḍapa in front.

p.hi: Viruppaṇṉa-uḍaiyār, son of Vīra-Ariyaṇṇa-uḍaiyār Śaka 1306, Raktākshi, Mēsha, śu. 15, Wednesday, Svāti = 1384 A.D., April 16, f.d.n. ·29.

summary.p: Records the sale, out of their share of the right of worship along with the rights and privileges attached to that share of the right including a house-site to Taḍuttāṇḍa-dēvar-nāyaṉār, son of Kāśiyapaṉ Namachchivāyadēvar, who was one of the śivabrāhmaṇas and who had the kāṇi in the temple of Tiruvalañchiramuḍaiya-nāyaṉār of Valañchiram in Pāṉūr-kūṟṟam in Malāḍu alias Jaṉaṉāthavaḷanāḍu in Magadai-maṇḍalam by one of three śivabrāhmaṇas, who had kāṇi in the temple of Tirukkāmīśvaram-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār, the God (uḍaiyār) of Āṟagaḻūr in Āṟṟūr-kūṟṟam. The first of the latter three brahmins, Kāchipaṉ Tāḻippiḷḷai alias Tiruchchiṟṟambala-nambi referred to 2 days kāṉi as that which had been given as strī-danam (dowry) to his mother Nalla-tāyār and 3/8 days kāṇi of his as that which he (his family) had secured (inherited ?), both of which he sold. The second, Poṉ-parappiṉār alias Tiruñāṉa-sambanda-brahmarāyar, son of Kāchipaṉ Namachchivāya-brahmārāyar, sold one day's kāṇi, which he had secured from Nambīyār Tirukkāmīśvaram-uḍaiyār alias Tiruñāṉa-sambanda-paṇḍitar and his co-sharers (uḷḷiṭṭār), who was also one conducting worship (pūśikkum) in the same temple. The third, Bhāradvājaṉ Kachchi-bhaṭṭan Tirunīṟṟu-vīrar, sold 1/2 days kāṇi, which had been given to him by his uncle or father-in-law (māmanār) Tāḻippiḷḷai alias Tiruchchiṟṟambala-nambi, the same having been given as bride-fee (pariśam) in favour of his mother by his father. The rights sold were expensive and comprehensive as they included entitlement to the privileges and rights attached to (the worship in) several other temples in the surrounding areas.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ḥ svasti . śrīmanurāmahāmaṇḍalecuran harirāya vibhāṭan bhāṣaikkut tappuvarāyar kaṇṭaṉ catussamudrātipati śrīvira Ariyaṇṇa Uṭaiyār kumāraṉ viruppaṇṇa Uṭaiyar prathivi Irājyam paṇṇi Aruḷā niṉṟa śakāptam 1000 3 100 6ṉ mel cellāniṉṟa ttākṣisamvatsarattu meṣanāyaṟṟu pūṟuva pakṣattu pūrṇaiyum putaṉkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa cotināḷ makatai maṇṭalam malāṭākiya jaṉaṉāta vaḷanāṭṭup pāṉūrk kūṟṟattu valañcirattu Uṭaiyār
tiruvalañciram Uṭaiya nāyaṉār koyiṟkāṇi Uṭaiya śivabrāhmaṇaril kāśyapaṉ namaccivāyatevar makaṉ taṭuttāṇṭa tevarṇṭa is written below the line following tā line and before nāyiṉārkku • here is a monoṅrammatical letter which seems to stand for tevarnāyaṉārkku Āṟṟūrkkūṟṟattu Āṟakaḻur Uṭaiyār tirukkāmicuramuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyiṟkāṇi Uṭaiya śivappirāmaṇaril kācipaṉ tāḻippiḷḷaiyāṉa tirucciṟṟampala nampiyum meṟpaṭi koyiṟkāṇi Uṭaiya kācipaṉ namaccivāyappiramārāyar makaṉ poṉparappiṉārāṉa tiruñāṉacampantap piramarāyarum Ikkoyiṟ kāṇi Uṭaiya pārattuvājaṉ
tiruvuṭaiyāṉ kaccipaṭṭar makaṉ tiruniṟṟuvirarum Āka Ivvaṉaivarom kāṇi vilaipramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭuttapaṭi kkuṭutta paricāvatu Inta taṭuttāṭkoṇṭa nāyaṉārkku nāṅkaḷ kāṇiyāka kalveṭṭik kuṭuttapaṭi Eṉ bhrātā Iṣapatevar makaḷ Inta taṭuttāṭkoṇṭa nāyaṉār mātā nallatāyārkku muṉṉāḷ tān stritaṉa prāptiyāka kuṭutta Eṅkaḷ ceṉmamāṉa nāḷ 2(1/2)m koṇṭuṭaiyomāṉa nāḷ ñ 1araikkāl m Āka nāḷ muṉṟekāle Araikkālum maṉaiyum
Uḷḷur tāyilunalla coḷicuramuṭaiya nāyaṉār poṉparappiṉa coḷicuramuṭaiya nāyaṉār maṟṟum pala koyilkaḷil Iṉnāḷāl varuṣam sakala prāptikaḷum paṭākai Āṟṟūr naraciṅkapuram pūṇṭi poṉparappi maṟṟum pala Ūrkaḷil palataḷi koyilkaḷil Iṉnāḷāl varum sakala prāptikaḷum Urittāvatākavum poṉparappiṉārāṉa tiruñāṉa campantapiramārāyaṉ Ikkoyil pūcikku nampiyār tirukkāmicuramuṭaiyārāṉa tiruñāṉa campanta paṇṭitar Uḷḷiṭṭār pakkal
koṇṭuṭaiyeṉāṉa nāḷāy yivarkku viṟṟa nāḷ kam meṟpaṭi Uḷḷūrp palataḷi koyilkaḷilum piṭākaikaḷil palataḷi koyilkaḷilum Inta nāḷ Oṉṟiṉāl varum cakalappirāttikaḷum Urittāvatākavum pārattuvājan kaccipaṭṭan tiruniṟṟu virar muṉṉāḷ Eṉ mātāvukku paricattukku Eṅkaḷ pitākkaḷ kuṭuttu Eṅkaḷ māmaṉār tāḻippiḷḷaiyāṉa tirucciṟṟampala nampi Iṉakkut tanta nāḷāy Ivarkku nāṉ viṟṟa nāḷ (1/2)m Uḷḷūr palataḷi koyilum meṟpaṭi piṭākaikaḷil pala
taḷikoyilkaḷilum Iṉṉāḷ varaikkum varum cakala prāptikaḷum Urittāvatākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu Āka nāḷ 4 mukkāl 1araikkāl m maṉaiyum Urittāvatāka cammatittu pramāṇappaṭikku kalveṭṭik kuṭuttom taṭuttāṭkoṇṭa nāyaṉārkku tāḻippiḷḷaiyāṉa tirucciṟṟampala nampiyum poṉparappiṉārāṉa tiruñāṉacampantap piramarāyarum kaccipaṭṭar makaṉ tiruniṟṟu virarum Āka Ivvaṉaivarom Ivai mutaliyār Akoracivar Eḻuttu nāyiṉār Eṉṉiṭaiya nāyaṉār Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 28.276 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
